scripts.release:patch: pnpm version patch && git push && git push --tags && gh release create v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") --generate-notes
scripts.release:minor: pnpm version minor && git push && git push --tags && gh release create v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") --generate-notes
scripts.release:major: pnpm version major && git push && git push --tags && gh release create v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") --generate-notes
